name: Carbón Hearts
short_description: Vanished to another world, Alawn is absolutely alone in a new world that he does not know at the mercy of this one... Or so he should have been if he had not bumped into her. Opening up this world and maybe something more. Starting with the first of two parts of this story
detailed_description:
This is the first of two part of a story.

The First part of Carbon Hearts
Carbon Hearts tell the story about Alaw. King of the dreads, he was banished to another world by one of the most important members of the enemy kingdom. It could have been his end but for his fortress he ran into her.

Classic style visual novel that tells the life of Alawn with his new partner in their daily life as two immigrants, she looking for a better life and him... that peace and acceptance that he sought all his life, in a city that many migrants only see as one. city of passage, it will be the place.

In the second part.
His past life comeback to him, and every decision will have its consequencese. The story will be divided into two perspectives, two worlds to which you can go freely, but what you have done in the world you leave will have its consequences. The story that develops will be based on the decisions you made. Coming Soon

Visual Nivel with relaxing music
